patch.value: Audit complete. Fixed 3 Sentry bugs (PM-CLI-Q localeCompare, PM-CLI-P ENOENT race, health.ts migration comparator). Added health fast-path flags (--skip-integrity/--skip-drift/--skip-vectors/--full) cutting routine health checks from 5-7s to ~800ms. 1306 tests pass. Remaining open items: pm-xk39 (history redaction), pm-xz1p (linked file hygiene), pm-2723 (Dependabot PRs blocked on CI). Committed 3351f84 and pushed to main.
